$comment: Selector registry for the tracker archetype. Flows reference @keys, never raw copy. text = Maestro regex (matches visible text OR a11y label). Anchors target the seeded entries (src/qa/fixtures.ts). The AddEntry value field autofocuses and defaults to 1, so the journey only types into the note field and asserts the noted entry on the home list.

today-card.note: the Today summary card label (i18n home.today)

add-button.note: the + FAB on home (a11y label home.add). Opens AddEntry.

note-input.note: the note TextInput on AddEntry (a11y label entry.note = 'Note (optional)'; parens escaped for the Maestro regex).

save-button.note: the save action in the AddEntry header (a11y label entry.save)

added-entry.note: an entry NOT in the seed; logged by the core add action. assertNot before / assert after = the write + summary refresh landed.
